inputs.label: Number
inputs.businessContext: The number to be rounded to the specified significant figures.

inputs.label: Significant Figures
inputs.businessContext: Number of significant digits desired in the result.

formulas.rounded: (function(v, sf) { if(v===0) return 0; var order = Math.floor(Math.log10(Math.abs(v))); var factor = Math.pow(10, order - sf + 1); return Math.round(v / factor) * factor; })(value, sigFigs)
